title: Paid Family and Medical Leave (PFML) Overview and Benefits — Massachusetts DFML
description: Comprehensive DFML overview of Massachusetts PFML under G.L. c.175M: eligibility/earnings requirements, qualifying reasons (own serious health condition, family-member care, bonding, military), duration limits (up to 20 weeks medical / 12 weeks family / 26 weeks military caregiver per benefit year), weekly-benefit calculation, the 7-day waiting period, retroactive-leave rules, appeals, and tax withholding.

source.publisher: Massachusetts Department of Family and Medical Leave (DFML)

update_cadence: Ad hoc (agency-maintained; benefit rates updated annually)
notes: Large file (~28 KB). KEY FIGURES/DEADLINES (per file): apply up to 60 days before leave; employer notice ≥ 30 days prior; 7-day waiting period; appeals within 10 days; reduced benefits if applying >90 days after leave began. Max weekly benefit per file: 2025 $1,170.64; 2026 $1,230.39. Statute M.G.L. c.175M. Page last updated Dec 29 2025 (in-file).
